events.fact: Crafted a Crude Bow at the workbench.
Obtained the first boar trophy after hunting in an abandoned village.
Acquired a Queen Bee and unlocked the Beehive recipe by destroying an abandoned structure.
Established a temporary shelter with a bed and campfire for the night.
Discovered the Black Forest biome, identified by pine trees.
Collected the first deer trophy, a requirement for summoning the first boss.
Encountered a Troll in the Black Forest and retreated due to lack of preparation.
Discovered a stone structure identified as a potential burial chamber.
Crafted a Wood Shield with a custom red and black style.
Crafted a Hoe for landscaping and base preparation.
Began construction on a custom 5x3 (standard floor tiles) home base near the Black Forest boundary.
Installed a fireplace and chimney system in the new home base.
Flint axe reached zero durability and required repair during woodcutting.
